name: extract-facts
description: Extract single-entity attribute facts from a passage of text and persist them as knowledge graph fact nodes. Self-classifies internally — always safe to call; exits early if no facts are found.

inputs.text: string (the message or turn text to extract facts from)

outputs.stored: number (new or updated fact nodes persisted)
outputs.skipped: boolean (true if the classifier gate determined no facts were present)
outputs.failed: number (facts that could not be persisted due to errors)
